programme.desc: Juvenile Court Judge Mary Beth Bonaventura observes that an indicator of what will happen in a child's life can be found by looking at the family and how supportive it has been; the kids seem to know this, too.

programme.title: Lockup Special Investigation
programme.desc: More than three thousand kids pass through the juvenile courts in Lake County, Indiana each year; here, consequences can range from a sleepless night in detention to the ultimate punishment for kids who keep coming back: Boys' School.

programme.title: Lockup Special Investigation
programme.desc: Ricky has spent a total of 266 days in Lake County, and another 16 months at a residential placement facility in Nevada; when he didn't return to his placement in Nevada after a weekend home pass, Ricky was picked up on a bench warrant.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw
programme.desc: In a life full of restrictions, we've seen inmates take control of whatever they can, despite the consequences; we've seen frustrated inmates reach their breaking point; in the battle of wills, some will take actions that can never be reversed.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Hedge-fund manager Samuel Israel III fakes his own death after defrauding investors of more than $450 million.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Two seemingly elderly California women befriend homeless men, then kill them to collect insurance money.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A man claims to be reformed after serving seven years in prison for turning his carpet cleaning company into a multimillion-dollar scam.

programme.title: Lockup: Orange County: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Inside the Orange County Jail a senior inmate takes up rap; a gang member poses a threat; another inmate makes the most shocking confession ever heard on Lockup.

programme.title: Lockup: Orange County: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Confinement takes a dark turn for a light-hearted teenager, but provides a new beginning for an old bank robber inside the Orange County Jail; a mother who has put drugs before her son gets another chance.

programme.title: Lockup: Orange County: Extended Stay
programme.desc: One inmate launches a near fatal attack after being in jail for less than an hour; a father accused of murdering his daughter admits to keeping her corpse with him for two years; a female inmate keeps a grim secret from her two best friends.

programme.title: Lockup: Long Island: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A female inmate finds romance with an alleged gang leader and the jailhouse prepares for a wedding; a very powerful inmate must make a choice between his crime family and his real family.

programme.title: Lockup: Long Island: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A young couple comes to jail after a crime spree, but their stories don't add up; one of the jail's most prolific contraband smugglers makes her return, but staff cracks down on the pipeline.

programme.title: Lockup: Long Island: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A night at the beach in his brother's truck sends a repeat offender back to jail; a Christmas morning hold-up leaves a young man dead and four people in jail with serious charges.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: On the way to an evil mountain where monsters are said to dwell, Speed chases a weird tank that appears in the jungle and finds a secret base at a lake.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed and Trixie participate in the Monte Carlo Rally, but the Mach 5 is hijacked in the Alps during a snowstorm by a man with an injured right hand.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: An assassin with a rifle is attempting to shoot the Princess who is in the royal box to wave the starting flag for the Mystic Grand Prix. However, the plot fails due to mirror reflection.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed escapes from a trap set by the assassin gang, and prevents the assassination of the President of Avalonia, the next target of the assassins. The Vice President and his secretary invite Speed to their official residence.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: To participate in a race in the United States, Speed and Trixie board a passenger plane. Dr. Fantasty, a developer of a new type of rocket fuel, is also aboard.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: There is an ongoing mystery that unmanned cars suddenly drive away and disappear. To date, 48,000 cars have gone missing. The police request Speed to track down those unmanned cars as they are not able to catch them.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed joins the Pineapple Grand Prix, a series of grueling courses. In honor of the legend that originated the race, racers are obligated to carry pineapples during the race. Then, it turns out that one of the pineapples has a stolen jewel inside.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: On a plane to Hong Kong to join a race, Speed witnesses a man being murdered with a poisoned needle, but someone kills the assassin lady to seal her mouth.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed and Trixie arrive at an airport to head for Hawaii and stumble across a shooting incident aiming at a stranger man and a girl. After their arrival to Hawaii, they find the man they saw earlier dead.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Gadge is the father of Gismo, a boy Speed met at a car show. Gadge has a grudge against Speed as he was fired from his team after losing a race to Speed, and he has devoted himself to 'car wrestling,' in which cars smash and destroy each other.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: An international space development base is under construction in the American West. In the plains, the equipment to be transported to the base has been robbed by a group called Motorcycle Apaches.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: A lightening awakens the 'Monster Car,' a huge monster-like tank resting in an old castle at the foot of the Alps. The Monster Car descends into the city and runs amok bringing total destruction.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: A daughter of a wealthy man, Baron Vondervon, disappeared 12 years ago. In memory of her who dreamed of becoming a racer, Vondervon decides to hold a 'Junk Car Grand Prix', in which only girls of 17 years old are eligible to participate.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: By air, Speed and his fellows are on the way to the Grand Prix, but their plane breaks down due to lightning, falling onto an uninhabited island with other passengers.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed receives a challenge letter from the Car Acrobatic Team, a team that he defeated in the Alpine Race one year ago. Speed heads for the designated spot although Racer X tries to stop him.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Mr. Goldminter, the richest man in the world, holds the Around the World Grand Prix. The champion will win tons of gold and his daughter, Lovelace. Upon a request, Speed joins the race with his pride as a racer.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: In order to win, the racers try to sabotage the race by any means necessary. Speed continues to race with his belief in fair play, but this motto comes to corner him. Speed aims to reach the goal driving the Mach 5, overcoming various obstacles.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: Go Mifune, a young and upcoming driver, drives a white-body super racing car named Mach 5. Speed enters his first race to win money for his family, against his father, Pops Racer.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: Go enters the Sword Mountain Race behind his father's back. However, Ace and his gang attack the Mach 5, aiming to steal the blueprints of Pops Racer's new engine.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: A masked racer, whose identity is in mystery, and whose face is concealed by a mask, came to Japan. He was a top racer but was also rumored to cause car crashes whenever he races.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: Go was saved by a masked racer who is revealed to be Go’s older brother, Rex Racer. When Speed was at Rex’s house, he was mistaken for Rex and kidnapped by intruder.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: Go tries to help a kind old man to find his stolen car. It turns out that the man is a son of a once infamous gang boss, and the classic car he drives has a map a stash of treasure.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: Go and the old man are captured by Blaggard, the boss of a gang. Speed fights back against the thugs and discovers where the treasure is hidden and offers Blaggard a deal.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: Inspector Detector suspects that the criminals are mixed up in the No Limit World Race. It turns out the criminal are participating in the race on a Mammoth Car.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: Go and Trixie learn that the Mammoth Car is the gold smugglers, but they fall into a trap. They are saved by a masked racer and pursue the Mammoth Car as it attempts to escape.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: After being challenged, Go decides to race against him at upcoming Great Alpine Race. Will Go able to beat Snake who a member of a dangerous racing team 'Car Acrobatic Team'?

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: Go fell to the bottom of the valley during the race. However, Sparkle and his team managed to escape the crisis. Go heads for Hell Valley, the most difficult point of the race.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Irita Marriott and Phil Serrell embark on a new Road Trip. Purchases include a garden fountain and a home-made post box. Phil wears shorts and Irita runs away to the circus.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Irita and Phil encounter a great bustard and a lesser spotted Dunhill while touring Norfolk and Lincolnshire. Phil also turns magpie with the silver but who will fly at auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil spends every last penny, while Irita buys a vase for a pound. Irita favours mutton sleeves in Hull, while Phil steps out of the classic car to be turned into a pumpkin.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Irita and Phil are in the Northeast and, after losing three auctions in a row, Phil fights back with a huge Methodist church sign! Will it pay off or will Irita do it again?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's Irita and Phil's last outing in the gold classic car and the pressure gauge is reading high! Can Mr Serrell clutch victory just as they race towards the finish line?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In Norfolk, Irita Marriott finds a 19th century automaton and learns about a hero from The Great War. Raj Bisram buys a damaged Stoneware Doulton flask and discovers how Princess Catherine helped rescue Jewish families from Nazi Germany.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Up in Northamptonshire, Irita Marriott picks up a B&B sign and a Japanese Satsuma pot, while Raj Bisram finds an Art Deco silver trinket box and a kaleidoscope from 1905. Plus a visit to the only surviving medieval town belfry in England.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott head to Oxfordshire in their 1978 MG Midget. Irita finds some hefty items and Raj discovers some items no gardener should be without. The day ends at an auction held in a former railway station hotel.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram finds a huge haul of famous pottery while Irita Marriott gets her hands on something that brings back happy childhood memories. Plus a visit to the Devon Sculpture Park and the delights of a Devonshire cream tea.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram pins his hopes on a risky item that may or may not be highly collectable. Irita Marriott finds a painting that contains a hidden secret. Along the way there's some sightseeing, kite flying and, of course, pirate impressions.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Tim Medhurst and Margie Cooper set off for Cumbria in a 1970s campervan, looking for antiques. Tim picks up a Scots Guards picture and rare Scottish jug, while Margie chooses a silver locket and bracelet. Plus a visit to a Roman fort.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In the Lake District, Margie buys a French carriage clock, a Chinese pepperette and a candlestick from Derbyshire. Tim falls for the image of a Victorian woman, though his Victorian horse toy might make for a bumpy ride at auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the Isle of Man, Tim Medhurst picks up a captain's chair, a pair of bears and a bronze sculpture of a footballer. Margie Cooper buys an antique corkscrew, a cocktail shaker and a bygone sewing machine complete with all its accessories.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Tim Medhurst finds a harvest jug, a pipe holder and gilt bar brooch. Margie Cooper buys a push-along donkey, a doggy nutcracker and prancing leather horse, but it's a ride on the ghost train that has her rather spooked.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects include a medicine chest from early Victorian times and rare Irish plate buckets.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team travel to the Bishop's Palace in Wells, Somerset.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects under scrutiny include a valuable bracelet once gifted by Queen Victoria.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team of experts are in Dundee.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Items discovered include a photograph of Winston Churchill and an old theatrical costume.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects found in Dulwich include an early illustration by madcap artist Heath Robinson.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to the Spa Royal Hall in Bridlington.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team brave the wet weather at Oxburgh Hall in Norfolk.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team choose their favourite moments and give updates on star items.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return in a new series. At Samares Manor in Jersey, objects from all over the world are examined.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce takes the team to the Lancashire coast for a busy day in the magnificent Blackpool Tower Ballroom.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return for a second visit to the Tower Ballroom in Blackpool.

programme.title: Wild France
programme.desc: Highlighting animals include the red squirrel and the lynx of the Jura Mountains, and the guillemot of Brittany's rugged sea cliffs.

programme.title: Wild France
programme.desc: BBC Earth brings you heart-pounding action, mind-blowing sights, and the wonder of this amazing planet we call home on Pluto TV.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Isolated and unstable mountains test the survival skills of wildlife in Africa.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Savannahs are dynamic, energy-rich worlds of grasses and trees.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Animals and plants find ingenious ways to survive in the desert.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: The rare and beautiful wildlife along the coasts of Africa.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: With an abundance of sunlight and rainfall, plants dominate in African rainforests.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Wildlife in and around Africa's waterways.

programme.title: Wild New Zealand
programme.desc: Untouched since the dawn of time, evolution runs riot in New Zealand to create some of the rarest and most unusual wildlife on Earth.

programme.title: Wild New Zealand
programme.desc: Male sea lions brawl for mating rights and females give birth on a sandy beach in the Auckland Islands, located halfway between New Zealand and Antarctica.

programme.title: Wild New Zealand
programme.desc: Four penguin species begin breeding every winter in four very different and rugged locations on New Zealand's South Island.

programme.title: Wild Japan
programme.desc: The central island of Honshu is home to over 100 million people, but is also home to an astonishing range of wildlife.

programme.title: Wild Japan
programme.desc: In the far south of Japan, there is a a place where all life is influenced by the power of the sea, and where volcanoes and typhoons are forces to be reckoned with.

programme.title: Wild Japan
programme.desc: Japan's northernmost island, Hokkaido is a place totally unlike the rest of the country. Every year it swings from a bitter Siberian winter into the warmth of a Mediterranean-like summer.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein visits Vienna, the city that once ran the Austro-Hungarian Empire. It is home to comfort dishes like tafelspitz and goulash, and it also gave its name to one of Europe's most popular dishes, the wiener schnitzel.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits Bologna in northern Italy, a city so famous for its food that it's known as the stomach of Italy. He learns how to make the local fresh egg pasta used for tortellini, tagliatelle, ravioli and lasagne.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein visits Lisbon on the banks of the River Tagus, a city in love with its seafood and possibly the best custard tarts in the world. The culinary effects of Portugal's historic explorations are still seen in its dishes.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits the home of New Nordic cuisine, Copenhagen, where ground-breaking chefs create artful dishes and religiously stick to seasonal Danish ingredients. Rick goes foraging for rosehip and learns about the art of pickling buds, bark and flowers.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein heads to southern Spain and the historic city of Cadiz, where the narrow winding streets captivate him as he walks in the footsteps of the ancient Phoenician and Arab traders whose influence on the city can still be seen today.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits the north-eastern Greek city of Thessaloniki.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein's long weekends across Europe come to a conclusion in the city of Palermo.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Bakeation
programme.desc: The Hairy Bikers head to Kristiansund on the coast of Norway to meet specialist artisan bakers.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Bakeation
programme.desc: Dave and Si journey through the Netherlands, where they bake lazybones buns beside a windmill.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Bakeation
programme.desc: The guys travel from the wine region of the Rhine Valley to the spiritual home of beer, Bavaria, and discover Germany's passion for bread of every shape, size and flavor.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Bakeation
programme.desc: The Hairy Bikers travel to the furthest corners of Europe, culminating in a fun family party thrown by Dave's Romanian wife, Lil.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Bakeation
programme.desc: The bikers tour the home of Mozart and Arnold Schwarzenegger, starting in the patisserie capital of the world, Vienna.

programme.title: Million Dollar Car Hunters
programme.desc: Car hunter Weaver visits Texas to value an Austin Princess hearse once owned by John Lennon; in New York City, Porsche once owned by American rock legend Janis Joplin goes up for auction.

programme.title: Million Dollar Car Hunters
programme.desc: Paul takes an Aston Martin DB4 GT on a classic car rally; Oliver has two customized group B rally cars.

programme.title: Million Dollar Car Hunters
programme.desc: The owner of a 1995 Audi Quattro Super Touring race car wants to race at Silverstone; Pete and Barney test drive a 1938 Packard Twelve Coupé Roadster and a 1959 Messerschmitt KR200.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: During medieval times, castles served as the military headquarters dominating the surrounding countryside. These important strategic strongholds were built on high ground, surrounded by a deep moat and had heavily fortified walls.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: Visiting the Bran, Targoviste and Sangov castles of Vladd III, known as Vlad the Impaler.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: The fall of Chateau Gulliard; Caerphilly Castle is defeated by a con man.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: A look at castles where torture was the norm.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: Pembroke Castle's clever strategy to overcome a lengthy siege.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: Edward I built a trail of castles in Wales to intimidate the Welsh.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: Ediburgh Castle; Stirling Castle; Glames Castle.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: Tintagel Castle evidence suggests King Arthur more than a myth; treasure hidden at Rennes-le-Chateau in France.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: The castles that housed Mary Queen of Scots.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: Captive princes; a prisoner's revenge; the diary of Ann Askew.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: Visits to castles throughout Europe reveal that thousands died because of their religious beliefs.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George takes on an Edwardian home suffering from an extreme case of 1970s wall-to-wall paneling; he also tackles a mock Tudor cottage in Hastings.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George works on a stripped Victorian terrace in Plumstead, looking to create a new layout that won't break the bank; he also visits a magnificent villa near Liverpool.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George works on a tricky conversion of a beautiful Arts and Crafts building; he works on an 18th-century country pub saddled with some dodgy DIY.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George helps a young couple make sense of their Victorian terrace house; he visits a woman converting two listed cottages into a family home.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George squeezes into an Edwardian Workers Cottage which is only half the size of a squash court, and visits a house with overwhelmingly Italian decor.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George visits a handsome turn-of-the-century terraced home whose new owners are set on a monochrome color scheme, and a workshop that makes antique effect mirrors.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas son encontradas muertas por envenenamiento con arsénico en Long Beach, California, amenazas de muerte escritas a mano y otras pistas hacen que la UAC busque a un sujeto fascinado con la mitología griega.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Placer culpable
programme.desc: La muerte de un oficial de la Marina lleva a Gibbs y al equipo al mundo de las prostitutas de lujo, confiando en la madame Holly Snow para que les ayude a atrapar a un asesino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Doble trabajo
programme.desc: Cuando el trabajo nocturno de un especialista en polígrafos del NCIS toma un giro peligroso, Gibbs, Fornell y el equipo tienen que descubrir la verdad.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Obsesión
programme.desc: DiNozzo se siente cada vez más cautivado por una mujer a la que no conoce mientras investiga el asesinato de su hermano.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Zona fronteriza
programme.desc: El equipo intenta localizar a un asesino en serie, mientras Abby se dirige al sur de la frontera para dar un discurso con McGee a cuestas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Estándares altos
programme.desc: Jamie y Frank chocan en sus puntos de vista sobre el trato que el público le dio a la policía después de que unos adolescentes revoltosos arrojaran agua sobre dos novatos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amigos influyentes
programme.desc: Mientras Henry trabaja como asesor de investigación para los servicios de menores, Danny y él se enfrentan por un caso relacionado con un hombre volátil con su mujer.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Errores graves
programme.desc: Mientras trabaja en el caso de una niñera acusada de abusos, Erin no está de acuerdo con la asesora psiquiátrica, la doctora Alice Dornan (Jennifer Bowles), en cuanto a su diagnóstico y sugerencia de castigo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Asuntos pendientes
programme.desc: Después de que una mujer es encontrada muerta en un club sólo para hombres, Danny y Baez investigan si su muerte fue un accidente o el resultado de un juego sucio.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Una serie de secuestros dirigidos cerca de Memphis tiene la BAU en busca de una coincidencia entre las personas desaparecidas y un motivo que les llevará al sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas son encontradas muertas por envenenamiento con arsénico en Long Beach, California, amenazas de muerte escritas a mano y otras pistas hacen que la UAC busque a un sujeto fascinado con la mitología griega.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC es llamada a Texas para realizar consultas sobre los asesinatos de prostitutas, la evidencia apunta a asesinatos con connotaciones religiosas. Pero a medida que profundicen en la investigación, el equipo podría poner en riesgo sus vidas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC continúa su investigación de asesinato en Texas y las pistas descubren una profunda red de corrupción que podría ser el motivo de los asesinatos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Obsesión
programme.desc: DiNozzo se siente cada vez más cautivado por una mujer a la que no conoce mientras investiga el asesinato de su hermano.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 6/5/2016. The famed Carnival celebration sets the tone for Anthony Bourdain’s visit to this city that boasts Kolsch, the raw minced pork dish mett and blood sausage.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 6/12/2016. Anthony Bourdain’s trip to this city renowned for its love of meat features a meal at the famed Don Carlos and an after-hours soccer match.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/20/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits the Johannesburg Suburb of Hillbrow, where he spends a day with a taxi driver while absorbing the culture and of course, food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 11/03/2013. Bourdain is in search of Tokyo's dark, extreme, and bizarrely fetishistic underside. It will be surprising, and at times shocking.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 11/10/2013. Take a look at Detroit’s history with Anthony Bourdain — from the dramatic economic rise and fall to the promising future it holds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/20/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits the Johannesburg Suburb of Hillbrow, where he spends a day with a taxi driver while absorbing the culture and of course, food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 11/03/2013. Bourdain is in search of Tokyo's dark, extreme, and bizarrely fetishistic underside. It will be surprising, and at times shocking.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 11/10/2013. Take a look at Detroit’s history with Anthony Bourdain — from the dramatic economic rise and fall to the promising future it holds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 4/24/2016. Anthony Bourdain explores the Philippines at Christmas and eats at beloved chicken chain Jollibee, samples sisig and indulges in the popular dessert halo-halo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/1/2016. Anthony Bourdain visits the iconic Old Town Ale House, eats mapo tofu in Chinatown and shares a home-cooked meal with rapper Lupe Fiasco.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/8/2016. On the island of Naxos, Anthony Bourdain dives to a sunken shipwreck, drinks raki with locals and samples cuisine fresh off a fishing boat.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/14/2021. Stanley Tucci feasts on pizza in Naples. Stanley embarks on a whirlwind tour to find the freshest mozzarella and the best San Marzano tomatoes, and enjoys a spectacular spaghetti and zucchini.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/21/2021. Stanley Tucci heads to Rome in search of the famous Four Pastas. Stanley orders rigatoni all’amatriciana, samples carbonara and tries a selection of cheeses and sausages made from the sheep and pigs farmed in the region.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/28/2021. Stanley Tucci explores Bologna, seen by many as the food capital of Italy. The region of Emilia-Romagna is home to globally renowned protected food products: parmigiano, prosciutto de Parma and traditional balsamic vinegar to name a few.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 3/7/2021. Stanley Tucci eats and drinks his way around Milan. Here, Stanley enjoys an aperitivo, feels inspired to make pizzoccheri – a noodle made from buckwheat, and enjoys classic Milanese – veal chops and risotto.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 3/14/2021. Stanley Tucci explores his former home: Tuscany. Stanley does a wine bar crawl, celebrates the importance of the lowly loaf and samples dishes which use stale bread as the key ingredient.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.desc: Officers respond to a fight in progress involving mace at a minimart, and a woman tells police that her boyfriend threatened to flush her late husband's ashes down the drain.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police track a vehicle leaving a known drug house, officers sort out the facts of a domestic disturbance call, and a daughter trashes her parents' house and threatens police.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy questions a driver about why his broken-down car looks like it’s been in an accident. Obstacle after obstacle prevents a woman from fixing her janky vehicle. A young man looking for a fresh start falls on hard times.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate driver attempts to flee on foot. Officers investigate a complaint in front of a local convenience store. Officers coordinate a sting designed to apprehend suspects who patronize prostitutes.

programme.title: COPS

programme.desc: Numerous patrol cars give chase to a man on a dirt bike refusing to yield, and an alleged armed robber is upfront about his reasons for running from police when approached.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.desc: A brutal motorcycle gang murder takes place in a biker bar.

programme.desc: When a porn producer and drug dealer are found dead in an upscale Vegas area, the CSIs focus their investigation on members of the neighborhood.

programme.desc: When two office mates plot to rob a casino, their plan ends with the CSIs investigating a murder.

programme.desc: When a policeman kills another officer, the CSIs must look to the evidence to determine if the shooting was premeditated or an accident.

programme.desc: El caso de dos estudiantes de secundaria, uno muerto y el otro desaparecido, llevan a los CSI a unas carreras callejeras de coches y a su complicada red de competición mortal.

programme.desc: Rascal Flatts toma el centro del escenario cuando un miembro de la banda es electrocutado por su propia guitarra durante un concierto, el equipo de CSI investiga si fue un asesinato.

programme.desc: Cuando un niño pequeño es encontrado asesinado, el equipo de CSI descubre evidencia que puede vincular su muerte con un viejo caso que resurgió recientemente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine y el detective Vartann pasan 24 horas juntos en una habitación de hotel mientras vigilan a un dúo que fabrica drogas en la habitación de al lado.

programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga el brutal asesinato de una familia, rastrean al asesino hasta la casa de al lado, que podría pertenecer al asesino en serie "Dr. Jekyll".

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Hodges y Wendy llevan a un grupo de exploradores de CSI de la escuela secundaria a una excursión, embellecen su papel en la resolución de casos y llevan su tarea un poco demasiado lejos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un estudiante es descubierto asesinado en la escuela de Lindsey, la investigación da un giro brusco cuando el equipo de CSI descubre una conexión poco probable entre la muerte del niño y atrocidades del pasado.

programme.desc: Un cómico legendario de los viejos tiempos de Las Vegas se reunirá con su compañero en el escenario solo por una noche, hasta que uno de ellos es encontrado muerto.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una madre que se pensaba que estaba de duelo por la pérdida de su familia hace tres años se convierte en sospechosa en una investigación de CSI.

programme.desc: El equipo de CSI debe investigar a uno de los suyos cuando Langston es acusado por un antiguo colega de ser parte de los asesinatos del Dr. Jekyll. Primera parte de dos del final de temporada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Las vidas del equipo de CSI están en juego a medida que se acercan al escurridizo Dr. Jekyll, y es posible que más de un miembro del equipo no viva para ver su captura. Segunda parte del final de temporada.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne is touched when Frasier agrees to pay for her wedding -- but aghast when he takes control of all the plans.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier vows revenge after a pair of radio "shock jocks" embarrass him in a series of on-air pranks.

programme.title: El bruto
programme.desc: El dueño de un edificio planea desalojar a sus inquilinos para venderlo. Ante la resistencia de los afectados, y con la ayuda de su amante, contrata a un matón para que se encargue de los desalojos de manera violenta.

programme.title: La Vida No Vale Nada
programme.desc: Con una perspectiva un poco fatalista sobre la naturaleza humana y la búsqueda de la felicidad a través del amor, Pablo experimenta de manera cínica algunas relaciones sin éxito.

programme.title: La Mujer del Puerto
programme.desc: Rosario, una joven mujer, se ve abandonada después de la muerte de su padre y un engaño amoroso, y se convierte en una prostituta enigmática en Veracruz, allí busca a su hermano perdido y una noche con el marino Alberto revela un trágico destino.

programme.title: Bárbara
programme.desc: Esta es la historia de un amor el cual no puedo realizer por diferentes circuanstancias y contratiempos con los cuales tendra que luchar los enamorados.

programme.title: Música y Dinero
programme.desc: Cuando un grupo de empleados amenaza con hacer huelga, el jefe le pide a un amigo cantante que ha recibido una herencia que lo ayude con su problema.

programme.title: El Enamorado
programme.desc: Martin Corona encuentra el amor y promote a su esposa a no volver a usar armas, hasta que sus enemigos lo obligan a volver a luchar, ahora por defender a su propia familia.

programme.title: El Guia de las Turistas
programme.desc: Un grupo de hermosas turistas es defraudado por la compañía de turismo que las deja a la deriva y sin dinero. Capulina al saber del problema decide ponerse al frente de la gira como guía de turistas y tiene un éxito fabuloso.

programme.title: El Investigador Capulina
programme.desc: Capulina confunde al vicepresidente de una empresa con un ladrón. Sus amigos los luchadores Tinieblas y Superzan acuden en su ayuda y evitan un asalto. Capulina creyéndose el héroe decide poner una agencia de investigadores.

programme.title: Justicia roja
programme.desc: Un estadounidense (Richard Gere) está en China por un viaje de negocios. Le acusan de un brutal asesinato y se encuentra a merced de un sistema judicial extranjero que no entiende. ¿Encontrará al verdadero asesino antes de que sea demasiado tarde?

programme.title: El embajador del miedo
programme.desc: Mientras toda la nación ve avanzar la campaña presidencial hacia las elecciones, un soldado corre contra el tiempo para descubrir una conspiración detrás de ella, una conspiración que podría destruir a la democracia misma.

programme.title: El callejón
programme.desc: Rosa es atrapada por un asesino en serie en una lavandería desierta escondida en un oscuro callejón. Después de horas de un sádico juego del gato y el ratón, descubre algo aún más perturbador sobre su agresor.

programme.title: Knock knock: seducción fatal
programme.desc: El gesto amable de un hombre de familia (Keanu Reeves) se convierte en una peligrosa seducción y el juego mortal del gato y el ratón cuando les abre la puerta a dos desamparadas jovencitas.

programme.title: Jade
programme.desc: Corelli está hasta el cuello en un caso que puede conducirlo donde no quiere ir. Chazz Palminteri interpreta a Matt, abogado y amigo de Corelli. Linda Fiorentino es la esposa de Matt, Trina; una psicóloga capaz de todo incluso de asesinar.

programme.title: Harlem Nights
programme.desc: Sugar Ray es el propietario de una casa de juego en Harlem. Con la ayuda de su hijo Quick, tratará de evitar que el gángster Bugsy Callhoune, que cuenta con la colaboración de un policía corrupto, se entrometa en sus negocios.

programme.title: Sueños de un asesino
programme.desc: La vida pacífica de la familia de Claire Cooper (Annette Bening) sufre un cambio terrorífico cuando un asesino serial (Robert Downey Jr.) invade su pueblo de Nueva Inglaterra... y acosa sus sueños con pistas de sus próximos movimientos mortales.

programme.title: La terminal
programme.desc: Luego de llegar al aeropuerto JFK de Nueva York, Viktor Navorski se encuentra atrapado involuntariamente en vaivenes burocráticos que no le permiten regresar a su país ni entrar a los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Serendipity ES
programme.desc: En el transcurso de una noche mágica, Jonathan (John Cusack) y Sara (Kate Beckinsale) se conocen de manera inesperada, luego cada uno se va por su lado, dejando que el destino guíe su futuro, si es que se supone que terminen juntos.

programme.title: Soltera a los 30
programme.desc: Cuando Kate cumple 30 años, sus amigas Evie y Charlie se ofrecen a hacer una fiesta, pero la fiesta se sale de control.

programme.title: Todos queremos a alguien
programme.desc: Karla Souza interpreta a una joven doctora soltera en Los Ángeles quien está dividida entre dos amantes y dos posibles amores, en esta divertida comedia romántica bilingüe.

programme.title: Ni en tus sueños
programme.desc: En esta comedia, Kirk, un tipo común, no puede creer su suerte cuando la exitosa y preciosa Molly se enamora de él. Sus amigos listos, su familia loca y hasta su insoportable exnovia están tan conmocionados como él.

programme.title: La boda de Valentina
programme.desc: Valentina tiene la vida perfecta en Estados Unidos. Su universo tiembla cuando su novio Jason le propone matrimonio y debe enfrentar a su familia, “los perfectos Tate”, con la suya, “los Hidalgo”, la dinastía política más caótica de la historia de México.

programme.title: Todos queremos a alguien
programme.desc: Karla Souza interpreta a una joven doctora soltera en Los Ángeles quien está dividida entre dos amantes y dos posibles amores, en esta divertida comedia romántica bilingüe.

programme.title: Resultado final
programme.desc: Después de que terroristas mortales secuestran a su sobrina en un partido de fútbol, un ex soldado con habilidades de combate letales (Dave Bautista) libra una guerra de un solo hombre para salvarla y evitar la destrucción masiva.

programme.title: El pacificador
programme.desc: Cuando un tren que transporta ojivas nucleares se estrella en la Unión Soviética, la especialista nuclear Dra. Kelly descubre que el accidente es en realidad parte de un complot para cubrir el robo de las armas.

programme.title: Especialista
programme.desc: In this action-packed thriller, Jason Statham is a mechanic—an elite assassin wa strict code and unique talent for cleanly eliminating targets. Simon West (CON AIR) directs this hit remake of the 1972 Charles Bronson movie.

programme.title: Narc: Calles peligrosas
programme.desc: Jason Patric es Nick Tellis, un oficial de narcóticos suspendido que debe investigar el asesinato de Michael Calvess, un policía novato que murió por circunstancias dudosas.

programme.title: Transpecos (LAS)
programme.desc: For three US Border Patrol agents, the contents of one car reveals a dark secret within their unit that could cost them all their lives. SXSW Grand Jury Award Winner 2016

programme.title: F/X: Efectos mortales
programme.desc: Rollie Tyler, un técnico de efectos especiales, acepta 30.000 dólares del Programa de Protección de Testigos para escenificar el falso asesinato de un miembro de la mafia que está dispuesto a dar nombres.

programme.title: Amor a primera visa
programme.desc: Alejandro, un mariachi, y su mejor amigo, Canicas, aprovechan un encuentro casual como una oportunidad para hacer cambiar de opinión a la joven de la embajada, Rachel, que rechazó la solicitud de visa de su hija para visitar EE. UU.

programme.title: Ya veremos
programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.title: El Crimen del Padre Amaro LAS
programme.desc: La política y las pasiones sexuales amenazan con corromper a un joven sacerdote recién ordenado en un pequeño pueblo mexicano.

programme.title: Secuestro Express
programme.desc: Carla y Martín son una pareja secuestrada por tres hombres que pasan una noche aterradora en Caracas mientras esperan que el padre de Carla pague el rescate.

programme.title: La virgen de agosto (LAS)
programme.desc: Eva decide quedarse durante agosto en Madrid, todo un acto de fe, para poder ver y sentir las cosas de otra manera y encontrar nuevas oportunidades.

programme.title: Ilusiones S.A.
programme.desc: Para hacer feliz a su mujer, un hombre contrata a una empresa que crea fantasías para fingir que su nieto, quien los dejó hace años, es un hombre de bien. Pero el verdadero nieto, quien es en realidad un delincuente, se aparece exigiendo dinero.

programme.title: Besos de Azúcar
programme.desc: Nacho es un niño que intenta sobrevivir los primeros años de su adolescencia como refugiado bailando en una máquina. Su vida cambia drásticamente cuando conoce a Mayra.

programme.title: Hansel y Gretel: Cazadores de brujas
programme.desc: Prepárate para una versión retorcida del cuento clásico. Convertidos en profesionales, Hansel y Gretel se enfrentan al trauma de su cautiverio infantil, asesinando brujas a sueldo.

programme.title: Piraña 3D
programme.desc: Un terremoto en Arizona abre una fisura en el fondo del lago Havasu, liberando decenas de pirañas prehistóricas que aterrorizan a la ciudad cercana.

programme.title: La maldición
programme.desc: En este thriller apasionante y sobrenatural con las estrellas más populares de Hollywood, un temor del estudio crece hasta convertirse en una vertiginosa pesadilla para un profesor y tres sujetos atrapados en una mansión misteriosa.

programme.title: The Ninth Gate (LAS)
programme.desc: Roman Polanski dirige y Johnny Depp protagoniza este thriller sobrenatural sobre un vendedor de libros raros que descubre un manuscrito demoníaco.

programme.title: La Dama De Negro
programme.desc: Arthur Kipps (Daniel Radcliff), un abogado viudo, debe ir a un pueblo remoto a resolver los asuntos de un excéntrico recién fallecido. Pero al llegar, descubre que todos en el pueblo ocultan un secreto mortal.

programme.title: La maldición gitana
programme.desc: Un abogado obeso accidentalmente corre y mata a una anciana gitana. Después de que su viejo lo maldice, él comienza a perder peso y no puede parar. Basado en la novela de Stephen King, escrita bajo el seudónimo de Richard Bachman.

programme.title: Cuernito Armani
programme.desc: La vida de un capo se complica cuando debe cumplir el deseo de su padre agonizante, se trata de presentarle a su novia pero él no la tiene. Tendrá que buscarla sin imaginar que la vida le tiene una grata sorpresa.

programme.title: Ladron Que Roba a Ladron (LAS)
programme.desc: Un par de ladrones profesionales hallan complicado su plan para robar a un millonario después de que los miembros hábiles del equipo regular rechazan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: El profesor chiflado
programme.desc: Jerry Lewis es un profesor de química tímido y miope que descubre una poción mágica que lo transformará en un guapo y encantador Romeo.

programme.title: Sin rumbo
programme.desc: Seth Green, Matthew Lillard y Dax Shepard actúan en esta comedia como amigos de la infancia que se han alejado, pero deben reunirse ante la repentina muerte de su cuarto amigo.

programme.title: ¡Super secreto!
programme.desc: La estrella de rock estadounidense Nick Rivers se enfrenta al temido Alto Mando de Alemania Oriental. En una carrera contra el tiempo, Nick ayuda a Hillary a buscar a su padre.

programme.title: El gurú del amor
programme.desc: Una hilarante comedia sobre un estadounidense criado en India por gurús que luego vuelve a los Estados Unidos más grande para iniciarse en el negocio de la autoayuda.

programme.title: The Gunfight at Dodge City
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start, Bat Masterson (Joel McCrea) rolls into Dodge City with a chip on his shoulder and a gun on his hip. But soon, his mysterious past will catch up with him when an old friend calls in a favor...one that might cost him his life!

programme.title: Hang 'Em High
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood stars in this brazen tale about a rampaging band of vigilantes who make two mistakes: they hang the wrong man and they don't finish the job. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern & Dennis Hopper co-star in this action-packed western.

programme.title: A Fistful Of Dynamite
programme.desc: The results are explosive when an Irish terrorist (James Coburn) with a dynamite obsession teams up with a Mexican peasant-turned-revolutionary (Rod Steiger) in this action-packed tale of power and politics. Directed by the legendary Sergio Leone.

programme.title: One Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: Marlon Brando’s only time as a Directo, Rio (Marlon Brando) also called "The Kid", his mentor Dad Longworth (Karl Malden), & a third man called Doc, rob a bank of two saddlebags of gold in Sonora, Mexico.

programme.title: The Legend Of the Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The sole surviving Texas Ranger of an ambush arranged by the outlaw leader Butch Cavandish returns to fight back as a great masked western hero - The Lone Ranger.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (1960)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars as one of seven gunslingers pitted against an army of marauding bandits in this rousing classic that made stars of Steve McQueen, Charles Bronson, and James Coburn. Eli Wallach also stars in this timeless tale of good versus evil.

programme.title: The Seven Year Itch
programme.desc: With his family away for their annual summer holiday, New Yorker Richard Sherman (Tom Ewell) decides he has the opportunity to live a bachelor's life. The beautiful but ditsy blond (Marilyn Monroe) from the apartment above his catches his eye.

programme.title: Some Like It Hot
programme.desc: This hysterical comedy from director Billy Wilder finds Tony Curtis and Jack Lemmon masquerading as women in order to elude irate Chicago mobsters while befriending a beautiful singer (Marilyn Monroe).

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos hombres fueron asesinados mientras dormían en sus camas. La noche siguiente, un incendio provocó la destrucción de una clínica de planificación familiar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe de una madre y sus hijos resultan ser algo más grave: intoxicación por talio. Después de la muerte de la madre, los investigadores centran su atención en encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El examinador médico clasificó la muerte como un accidente, pero los detectives que investigaron el caso declararon que la evidencia en la escena indicaba lo contrario.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesinato en el menú
programme.desc: Cuando el jefe de cocina de un restaurante histórico de Filadelfia fue encontrado muerto, los investigadores entrevistaron a los sospechosos habituales: familiares, amigos y compañeros de trabajo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesino forestal
programme.desc: Un asesino intentó incinerar y destruir todo lo que pudiera relacionarlo con su crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Huellas entre ladrones
programme.desc: El asesinato de un excéntrico millonario no fue del todo inesperado; alardeaba de su riqueza y se preocupaba poco por la seguridad personal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2006, Kathy Augustine, una política de Nevada, murió misteriosamente durante una campaña de reelección. El médico forense no pudo aislar la causa de la muerte ni explicar las pequeñas heridas punzantes descubiertas durante la autopsia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la década de los 90, los medios llamaron a Richard Rogers el "asesino de la última llamada" porque atacaba a hombres en bares gay que obviamente estaban intoxicados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Plato frío
programme.desc: Un hombre murió en su casa después de una larga historia de enfermedad cardíaca. Se asumió que esta fue la causa de su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra a Joann Katrinak muerta en un campo de maíz con su hijo pequeño, el sospechoso más obvio es el esposo y padre de las víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un hombre rico y su esposa fueron atacados por tres hombres enmascarados fuera de su lujosa casa en Louisiana. A él le dispararon hasta causarle la muerte y a ella la obligaron a abrir la caja fuerte que tenían escondida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando el secretario de la corte, Peter Porco, no se presenta a trabajar en noviembre de 2004, se ordena a un oficial de la corte que se dirija a la casa familiar de los Porcos en Bethlehem, Nueva York.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1984, los bomberos de California habían combatido diez incendios provocados en tres semanas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los doctores no saben por qué un científico joven se ha enfermado muy gravemente. Cuando las pruebas revelan finalmente la causa, es muy tarde para salvarlo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la búsqueda del asesino de dos adolescentes de Texas, un perfil de conducta llevó a sospechar de Jason Massey. La ciencia demostró que el perfil era correcto y Massey fue ejecutado mediante inyección letal el 3 de Abril del 2001.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Jardín del mal
programme.desc: Cuando un popular disc jockey fue encontrado asesinado en un jardín comunitario, la policía entró en acción.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Enamorado mortal
programme.desc: Un obstetra regresó a casa del hospital y encontró a su esposa en el piso del baño. Estaba cubierta de sangre y no respiraba.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una maestra dedicada y respetada desapareció, la policía tuvo que determinar si se había ido de vacaciones sin decírselo a nadie, o si era víctima de un juego sucio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer desaparece, los amigos y familia se proponen encontrarla. Sus peores miedos se confirman semanas después cuando se descubre su cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Susan Fassett fue abatida a tiros cuando salía de su práctica de coro de la iglesia en Poughkeepsie, Nueva York. Su esposo Jeff se convirtió en el principal sospechoso, hasta que fue absuelto por la policía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El sospechoso principal tenía un historial criminal y su licencia de conducir se encontró en la escena del crimen de un brutal homicidio doble.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a la esposa de un dentista bien conocido, la policía se esfuerza por identificar a un sospechoso. Algunas fibras y un estudio de los patrones climáticos en la noche del asesinato abren el caso y revelan al asesino.

programme.title: Horizon

programme.title: Horizon

programme.title: Horizon

programme.desc: A cynical Alex finds the spirit of Christmas in a dream.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.desc: Alex pretends to support the Equal Rights Amendment to impress a pretty feminist.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.desc: Elyse feels the need to expand her horizons.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: The news that their mother is pregnant sends the three Keaton kids into an angry outburst resulting in a family battle.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Little Jennifer is thrilled about getting a visit from her former neighborhood pal, Scott, whom she hasn't seen in five years.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.desc: Alex cannot accept the fact that he and everyone around him are growing up and desperately clings to his old ways.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants hold onto monkey bars, suspended under a helicopter. In a Plexiglas coffin and covered with leeches. Contestants search for rubber boots at the bottom of a tank of cut up fish parts. Contestants must run their motorcycles off of a cliff.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Player A is placed on a dunk tank. In the tank is a mixture of cow parts floating in water. One member of the team will be suspended by their ankles underneath a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants are harnessed and locked into a computer ratchet system. Couples will make their way through junkyard obstacles, retrieving hubcaps. The male contestants will be standing on top of a bus while their female partners are strapped under the bus.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Two contestants will be driving a boat down a path while connected to a helicopter. Contestants will be on their knees inside a plexiglas tank. Contestants will be standing in a plexi box that is suspended over water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on the back of the fireboat. Contestant will have the option to drink up to three habanero pepper smoothie shots. One contestant will be standing at the top of a fire slide while their partner is standing at the slide-stairs.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will each be standing on the back of a flatbed truck driving down the edge of a pier. Contestant must guide their blindfolded partner through a maze of electrical tripwires.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Child contestant will be standing on top of the light tower while the parent is hanging from a helicopter. The parent contestant will be peddling a stationary bicycle. The child is standing on the roof and their parent is navigating through a maze.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The parent and the child will have to cross a beam above the water releasing flags along the way. Cockroaches are being poured into the box while the child sits in a box without a top. In this family stunt the child will start by standing on the dock.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be standing on the platform that is suspended. Contestants will lick bugs off of ropes. A glass tube is suspended vertically from a crane with the top sealed and the bottom open and submerges in a pool.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be dangling from a rope off the roof. Contestants will have to clear a bug splattered car windshield using only their mouth and face. The contestant will be standing on a beam suspended from a crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Team of two contestants will be in a four-walled roof-less office- type room that is filled with desks, chairs, filing cabinets, etc. Contestants will be bound in straight jackets and will have amount of time to escape.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Celebrity 2. To move flags from one open window across and around the outside of a building. To separate and move white snakes out of a group of green. To escape from a submerged cage and swim to a life ring.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: With Monica's assistance, a man on death row seeks forgiveness.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's neighbor Miss Lewis has a crush on Mr. Ritter, the local grocer but istoo shy to invite him to dinner. Trying to play Cupid, Lucy invites him for her but he gets the idea that Lucy has fallen for him. Apparently Mr. Ritter is fond of Lucy as well.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In a deception planned to convince Ricky that she ought to be in his new nightclub act, Lucy pretends to have a nervous breakdown. She consults a book on abnormal psychology that reveals three complexes she assumes.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides to break into show business by writing a play about a Cuban tobacco picker and entering it in her women's club play competition. Of course she wants Ricky to star in it but he refuses.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes enjoy an evening singing around the piano with the Ricardos in their apartment. When they retire for the night and Lucy and Ricky continue singing, Ethel phones them demanding quiet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky needs a ballet dancer and a burlesque comic for his club's new musical revue. Lucy wants the ballet gig and takes dance lessons from a strict instructor. Learning the disciplined art is much more difficult than she imagined.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Peggy, a teenage neighbor, breaks up with her boyfriend Arthur because she is infatuated with Ricky. Lucy tries to help the clumsy schoolboy learn how to dance in order to win back Peggy's affections. To complicate matters more, Arthur falls for Lucy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are eager to get a closer look at the belongings of the O'Briens, new neighbors in the building. They snoop around in their apartment while they are away and when they hear the O'Briens return, Lucy is trapped in the closet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: Nadakhan vows revenge on the ninja and NINJAGO. The ninja and Soto escape from jail, only to find out the map to the island is on Nadakhan’s ship. Nadakhan discovers that Nya looks just like Delara, his long-lost love.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja’s search for Nadakhan’s ship turns up nothing. Nadakhan’s crew is struggling to handle an airship that used to sail only on the oceans. Nadakhan confronts Jay and talks him into making a wish that will win him Nya.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián. Segunda parte.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Queen Gretchen of the Kingdom of Monaka dies from a car accident. As a fan of her years as a Hollywood actress, Lupin mourns her passing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Once a year, jewelers from around the country descend on New York City for a jewelry tradeshow, bringing with them their entire inventory. Combined, the jewelry is said to be worth 20 million dollars.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have Pinkerton's unbreakable safe, minus the key. Lupin breaks into the prison where the late Pinkerton was once held and finds the key hidden in his former prison cell. Now the gang has both the safe and key.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: At Fujiko's request, Lupin steals the Hina dolls given to the US Vice President by the Deputy Prime Minister of Japan. However, the doll heist was a trap laid out by Fujiko and her partner, Barracuda.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Goemon pities the young boy who is afflicted with an incurable illness and swears to retrieve his father's painting for him. Will Goemon be able to keep his promise and will Lupin decipher the painting's hidden secret?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The 100-carat blue diamond, known as Hades' Tear is auctioned off at 1 billion dollars along with its accompanying Hades statue to the KL Foundation of Kingsland. Lupin and Jigen make off with Hades' Tear with ease, but they find out it's only glass.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mexico's richest woman, Madame Tequila owns a black diamond named the Black Pig of Mexico. Realizing that Lupin is after her diamond, Madame Tequila appoints Inspector Zenigata to guard it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Ivanov, the Soviet Union's newest atomic submarine from the Port of Arkhangelsk. Lupin becomes entangled in a fierce tug of war between the KGB and CIA when Fujiko decides to sell it to the highest bidder.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #9 Islands of Assasins
programme.desc: The den of the deadly Tarantulas gang, this island is the most dangerous place on Earth… and Lupin's right in the middle of it! A dark mystery haunts his past, and the key to it is on the island.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #10 Tokyo Crisis
programme.desc: When Lupin and his bandit buddies attempt to steal a set of historically significant photographic plates, it turns out they're not the only ones with eyes on the prize in this thievish tale of mayhem and millionaires.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #11 The Columbus Files
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko are after the mysterious treasure known only as Columbus' Egg. Fujiko was able to memorize the Egg's location, but when she's attacked and loses her memory, all seems lost. No one else knows where it is. What's a thief to do?

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #12 Missed by a Dollar
programme.desc: At an auction in New York, attendees are shocked when a mysterious man bids $1,000,000 on a plain diamond ring. The man himself is even more astounded when the President of the World Bank outbids him by a single dollar. The man is Lupin!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata arrives in San Marino after receiving a note from Lupin III. Instead of a declaration of a new theft, it's a wedding invitation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Marlow Brozzi, a soccer player from San Marino. A mafia member has proof that Brozzi is cheating so Brozzi approaches Lupin for help.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang managed to steal a fragment of Marie Antoinette's necklace, but Jigen has been captured by Nyx.

programme.desc: Captain Arnold shows Mister Rogers various aspects of being a firefighter. Volunteer Firefighter Handyman Negri asks Lady Elaine for her garden hose. Smoke is seen coming from the Platypus mound. Lady Elaine puts out the fire.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Fred Rogers visits a school and sees what the students do during a fire drill. Everyone is working to repair the Platypus Mound, which was damaged by a fire. Lady Elaine Fairchilde receives an award from King Friday XIII.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers demonstrates how to use a computer mouse as he introduces viewers to the "online neighborhood." The King and Queen are searching for the "royal mouse."

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers watches demonstrations of mechanical ball inventions. Prince Tuesday and Lady Aberlin are outside the castle playing with a unique toy. King Friday is unhappy about not finding Hula Mouse and breaks the toy.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Not everyone in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe has recovered from the previous day's drama. King Friday tries to apologize. Mister Rogers shows a film about how people make bread.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers watches children dancers perform and musicians play. King Friday sincerely apologizes to Hula Mouse for his previous behavior. Lady Elaine presents an exhibit of round things. Mr. McFeely shows a film on how marbles are made.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about curiosity. He uses a frame to look closely at different parts of a large mural, and the vegetables in the piece remind him of his trip to "The Edible Schoolyard" in Berkeley, California, where children garden.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Negri's Music Shop where musicians are playing different homemade instruments. Mr. McFeely brings a video showing how people make ice cream cones.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Wonder what it's like to go up in a bucket lift? Mister Rogers rides 60 feet up in the air in one and then comes back down. Mr. McFeely has a video about how people make ice cream.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: There's a new store in the Neighborhood -- it's Tony Chiroldes' shop where he sells books, toys and costumes. Tony has always been curious about what it would be like to travel in outer space, and he tries on an astronaut costume.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Guitarist Manuel Barrueco provides an amazing performance. King Friday requests a "looking inside things device" from Corney. The best Corney could come up with is a "look carefully device" magnifying glass.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about the graceful nature of the fish. He visits a ballet studio where he watches a performance. Lady Elaine wants H.J. Elephant to be on her first program, but H.J. is hesitant since he cannot read very well.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: What's in Mister Rogers' box? There are words for people who know how to read words, pictures for people who know how to read pictures and a toy truck! Mister Rogers shows a video with different big trucks.

programme.desc: H.J. Elephant recieves help from Mayor Maggie as he reads his first words. Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about how people make ball caps. Before he leaves, Mr. McFeely is allowed to take one of Mister Rogers' caps with him.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a small potted oak tree he is looking after for Mr. McFeely. Prince Tuesday is unhappy with his drawing of the Eiffel Tower. Mayor Maggie compliments Prince Tuesday and gives it to a very pleased Grandpere.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a garage where electric cars are being made, and he takes one out for a drive. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Handyman Negri organizes a search for Prince Tuesday, and the unhappy Prince is finally found.
